form.title: 类型层级查询
form.layout: indexId[索引ID] qualifiedName[全限定类型名] direction[方向] maxDepth[最大深度]

simple.name: main
simple.afterForm: [ { "type": "divider" }, { "type": "panel", "title": "查询结果", "visibleOn": "${symbol != null}", "body": [ { "type": "alert", "level": "info", "body": "当前类型: ${symbol.qualifiedName | default:'-'} (${symbol.kind | default:'-'})" }, { "type": "panel", "title": "父类型 (Super Types)", "visibleOn": "${superTypes != null && superTypes.length > 0}", "collapsable": true, "body": { "type": "input-tree", "name": "superTypes", "multiple": false, "showIcon": true, "initiallyOpen": false, "valueField": "symbol.qualifiedName", "labelField": "label", "childrenField": "children", "source": "${superTypes | map: item => ({ label: item.symbol.qualifiedName + ' (' + item.symbol.kind + ')', children: [].concat(item.superTypes || [], item.subTypes || []) }) }", "deferApi": "", "searchable": true } }, { "type": "panel", "title": "子类型 (Sub Types)", "visibleOn": "${subTypes != null && subTypes.length > 0}", "collapsable": true, "body": { "type": "input-tree", "name": "subTypes", "multiple": false, "showIcon": true, "initiallyOpen": false, "valueField": "symbol.qualifiedName", "labelField": "label", "childrenField": "children", "source": "${subTypes | map: item => ({ label: item.symbol.qualifiedName + ' (' + item.symbol.kind + ')', children: [].concat(item.superTypes || [], item.subTypes || []) }) }", "searchable": true } } ] } ]
